goal: Verify 14 acceptance scenarios green; add Vitest unit tests for core/contact schema (DISTILL-05). 4 scenarios deferred pending credentials and Swoopy modelId.

steps.name: Verify navigation acceptance tests green
steps.criteria: All 8 navigation scenarios pass; nav links reach correct pages; logo returns home; 404 non-500; CTA reaches contact form
steps.scenario_name: visitor selects About and reaches the about page

steps.name: Verify about page scenarios green
steps.criteria: All 4 about-page scenarios pass; block order uses real content; unknown path non-500
steps.scenario_name: visitor sees content blocks in declared order

steps.name: Verify services page scenarios green
steps.criteria: All 3 services-page scenarios pass; prose selector has visible text; unknown path non-500

steps.name: Verify contact page a11y scenarios green
steps.criteria: All 9 contact-page scenarios pass; role=alert visible; button disabled during send; existing 7 remain green
steps.scenario_name: inline validation errors announced via role=alert

steps.name: Add Vitest unit tests for contact schema
steps.criteria: 5+ test cases green; valid data passes; empty and whitespace names rejected; invalid email rejected
steps.scenario_name: whitespace-only name rejected by contact schema
